name: ClawMemory
description: Local-first memory plugin (Markdown + SQLite) for OpenClaw

pythonBin.description: Python executable used to run ClawMemory bridge

memoryRoot.description: Memory root directory (resolved by openclaw resolvePath)

autoFlushMaxTurns.description: Auto flush short-term session buffer after N turns

minConfidence.description: Minimum confidence for session fact extraction

reminderDefaultSeconds.description: Default due duration for reminder_set when omitted
